AccountLogin.title: Sign in
AccountLogin.errorMessage: Something went wrong sending the link. Please try again.
AccountLogin.checkEmailBody: If that email is on file, we've sent a link to sign in — it may take a minute to arrive. You can close this tab.
AccountLogin.captchaPending: Complete the verification above to continue.

Footer.blurb: Christ Apostolic Church North America — one fold, gathered from every region, once a year.
Footer.newsletterBody: Convention updates and reminders, straight to your inbox.
Footer.newsletterAlready: You're already on the list — thank you!
Footer.newsletterError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Home.title: CACNA Convention
Home.subtitle: Christ Apostolic Church North America Convention
Home.missionBody: Every convention follows the same rhythm: daily prayer, ministers' sessions, youth and children's break-outs, and a nightly revival service — closing in Holy Communion and a send-off.
Home.rhythmPrayerDesc: Every day begins grounded in prayer and worship together.
Home.rhythmMinistersDesc: Messages from visiting CAC leadership across every region.
Home.rhythmBreakoutsDesc: Dedicated programming for youth, young adults, and children's ministry.
Home.rhythmRevivalDesc: An evening revival service, closing in Holy Communion and a send-off.
Home.galleryHeading: See highlights from our last convention
Home.galleryBody: Photos from worship, sessions, and fellowship throughout convention week.
Home.newsBody: Stay up to date with CACNA announcements, including our upcoming 50th anniversary celebration.
Home.registrationComingSoon: Registration for the July 12–17, 2027 convention opens in October 2026 — pricing will be posted here as soon as it's confirmed.
Home.giveBody: Every gift keeps food free for all ages throughout the week and helps with travel support for the churches that need it most.
Home.watchBody: Real sessions from CACNA's own YouTube channel — sermons, revival nights, and convention worship.

ProgramGrid.heading: Find your program.
ProgramGrid.intro: Every attendee has a home base for the week — dedicated sessions, teachers, and fellowship for every age and calling.

FindYourPath.heading: Find your path.
FindYourPath.intro: Wherever you're starting from, here's exactly what to do next.
FindYourPath.firstTimeBody: New to CACNA? Here's what to do before you arrive — no prior convention experience needed.
FindYourPath.returningBody: Know the rhythm already? Here's what's new for this year and how to get registered.
FindYourPath.groupLeaderBody: Bringing your church, ministry, or family group? Register together and plan the trip.
FindYourPath.ministerBody: Ministering or serving this year? Find the schedule and let us know you're coming.

About.title: About CACNA
About.subtitle: The story, mission, and people behind the CACNA Annual Convention.
About.worldwideLeadershipBlurb: CACNA is one region within Christ Apostolic Church Nigeria & Overseas, guided by its worldwide executive leadership.
About.readFullStory: Read the full CAC North America story, including our organizational structure and history, on our main site.
About.readFullStoryCta: Read our full story on cacnorthamerica.com
About.superintendentsBlurb: CACNA's Zones and DCCs are shepherded by dedicated superintendents across the United States and Canada. Find yours on our main site.
About.familyHeading: More than an event. It's family.
About.familyBody: Walls and dates don't make a convention — people do. Every July, the whole CACNA family gathers as one: first-timers and lifers, elders and children, worshiping and growing together as one fold.
About.exploreHeading: Everything you need, in one place.
About.exploreScheduleDesc: Every session, every day of the Convention.
About.exploreRegisterDesc: Reserve your spot for this year's gathering.

Schedule.title: Schedule
Schedule.noEdition: Schedule details will be posted closer to the convention.

Store.title: Store
Store.intro: Sunday school materials and devotionals from CACNA's Christian Education Department, plus convention merchandise.
Store.materialsIntro: Current items from the CACNA Christian Education Printing Press, with prices as listed on their shop.
Store.apparelIntro: Convention, Good Women, and Youth & Young Adult apparel — add items to your cart and check out securely with Stripe.
Store.emptyCartHint: Add an item above to get started.
Store.checkoutError: Something went wrong starting checkout. Please try again.

PlanYourVisit.title: Plan Your Visit
PlanYourVisit.hotelsIntro: All hotels below offer a group rate for CACNA — mention the group code when booking. Complimentary breakfast and WiFi at every property; hotels are roughly 30 minutes from CAC Village.

Anniversary.bannerText: Celebrating 50 years of CAC North America — join us October 10, 2026 at CAC Village.

Give.title: Give
Give.intro: Every convention happens at CAC Village — and every gift toward it helps pay down the very ground you'll be standing on.
Give.villageBody: Help pay down the mortgage on CAC Village, Blue Ridge Summit, PA — the home of our Annual Convention, every year. Kindly send your donation to the account below.
Give.moreWaysBody: See CACNA's other campaigns — the CAC Centenary Building Project and Hope For All Initiative — plus phone and email giving options, on our main site.
Give.registerTieBody: Every gift toward CAC Village helps host the very convention you're planning to attend. If you haven't registered yet, secure your spot at the village you're helping pay for.

News.title: News & Events
News.intro: Announcements and upcoming events from CACNA.
News.fromCacWorldIntro: News from Christ Apostolic Church Worldwide, headquartered in Nigeria.

Live.title: Live
Live.intro: Watch CACNA convention services live on YouTube, and catch up on this year's sessions below.
Live.sessionsIntro: The full playlist of this year's convention sessions, updated as each one streams.
Live.pastYearsNote: Looking for a previous year's convention?
Live.pastYearsCta: Browse past broadcasts on our YouTube channel

Register.title: Register
Register.heroBodyOpen: Individual and group registration is open now — secure your spot at CAC Village before rates rise.
Register.heroBodyComingSoon: Registration for {dateRange} opens in October 2026. Bookmark this page — pricing and the guidelines below will go live the moment it does.
Register.heroUrgency: Adult rate is ${price} through {date} — register now before it goes up.
Register.submitError: Registration failed. Please try again or contact us.
Register.notOpenYet: Registration for the July 12–17, 2027 convention opens in October 2026 — check back then.

PromoBanner.beforeIncrease: Adult rate is ${price} through {date} — register now before it goes up.

RegisterCta.heading: Join Us at the 2027 Convention
RegisterCta.bodyComingSoon: Registration for the July 12–17, 2027 convention opens in October 2026 — pricing will be posted as soon as it's confirmed.
RegisterCta.bodyOpen: Secure your spot at CAC Village, July 12–17, 2027 — individual and group registration is open now.

RegisterConfirmation.title: Thank you for registering!
RegisterConfirmation.body: We've received your registration. A confirmation email is on its way.
RegisterConfirmation.notFoundBody: This link may be out of date, or the registration may no longer exist. If you just completed checkout, check your email for a confirmation — otherwise, contact us and we'll help sort it out.

StoreConfirmation.title: Thank you for your order!
StoreConfirmation.body: We've received your order. A confirmation email is on its way.
StoreConfirmation.notFoundBody: This link may be out of date, or the order may no longer exist. If you just completed checkout, check your email for a confirmation — otherwise, contact us and we'll help sort it out.
